body.notes: All resources need a history Igor can watch. Cash resources (OR balance, Anthropic balance) need special care — rate of spend, trajectory, not just point-in-time. Surface as grounded body reality (InteroceptionSource analog for external resources). OBSERVED: OR balance $150→$90 over ~2 days = $30/day burn. $90 remaining ≈ 3 days at current rate. Igor should feel the spend rate, not just see a number. Needs: resource_history table (resource, balance, sampled_at), delta/hour trend, TWM entry with trajectory signal (rising/stable/falling fast), milieu nudge when burn rate is high. OR balance already polled via check_openrouter_balance — wire that into the history table on each poll.
body.title: Resource history tracking — OR balance + all resources get a watchable time-series
body.result: balance_history table + get_balance_trajectory() in budget.py; HeartbeatSource._check_burn_trajectory() pushes TWM alert when >0/day or <3d remaining; check_openrouter_balance tool shows burn rate inline. Tests: 30 passed.
